title: Bare Metals: Crafts & Additions
description: Texture pack for Create: Crafts & Additions that makes it fit in with Bare Bones and Bare Metals
body: Texture pack for Create: Crafts & Additions that makes it fit in with Bare Bones and the Create expansion, Bare Metals. Previously released in Bare Metals V1.4, it is now being released as separate pack.
